name: SDK Connector
description: Programmatic data ingestion and export via the Loxtep SDK
use_cases: Write events programmatically from application code
Custom ETL pipelines using the Loxtep SDK
Programmatic data ingestion from any source

entity.name: SDK Connector
entity.description: Write and read events programmatically using @loxtep/sdk (Node.js) or loxtep (Python)

output_queue_name.description: Target queue name for SDK-written events

bot_id.description: Bot ID for stream bus checkpointing

connector_package.description: SDK connector for programmatic data ingestion. No HTTP actions — data flows through LoxtepClient.flows.get_writer() via the Stream Bus.
follow_up_notes: Install the SDK: npm install @loxtep/sdk (Node.js) or pip install loxtep (Python)
Authenticate: run `loxtep login` or set LOXTEP_AUTH_TOKEN env var
Write events: use client.flows.get_writer(flow_id, { bot_id, output_queue_name })
